case_title: PACIFIC POWER TESTING VS. ALEX CORONA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC POWER TESTING AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC POWER TESTING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-05-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF $545.00 BY 2/5/14 OR JUDGMENT IS TO ENTER ON THAT DAY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SUSAN MACHADO--OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT 1/22/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
